title: elaphoglossum macdougalii
intro: Elaphoglossum macdougalii, also known as MacDougal's Elaphoglossum, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is native to Mexico and Central America, where it grows on tree trunks and branches. The medicinal properties of Elaphoglossum macdougalii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations, and it is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies.
